productDisplayName: Nike Men Blue Odi Game Day Cap
description: Style NoteCreated by nike for the ardent cricket fan, sport this blue cap to express your support as well as to beat the scorching sun during a match. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket, this cap is a must buy.Product DetailsBlue cap, embroidered on the front, eyelets on the crown, mesh panel inlays with Nike swoosh on left panel, curved visor with machine embroideryWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care100% polyesterHand wash cold waterDo not dry cleanLine dry
